title: Old Pearl Barter Rate
description: 1.16 piglin bartering rates for the newer versions.
body:
This mod restores the original _Minecraft _1.16__ piglin bartering rates, bringing back the balanced and more generous trades from that version. In newer versions of Minecraft, piglins rarely give useful items like ender pearls, making early progression (like reaching the End) much slower. With this mod, piglin bartering once again feels rewarding and reliable, just like it did in _1.16_.

If you watched Dream's Speedrun Streams you're at the right place.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e0048b91086ffcbb4752e87a0ebe42ebeb9899e.png)
